positive: A stylized, abstract composition featuring a pair of minimalist, geometric golden keys interwoven with vibrant bioluminescent flora. The scene should evoke an adventurous, magical feeling, set against a dark, deep sapphire blue background. Use clean lines and high contrast, emphasizing strong negative space around the main elements. The style must be highly detailed line art mixed with glowing, ethereal digital painting, perfect for single-color silhouette printing. Studio lighting, symmetrical composition, intricate cross-hatching style details, vector illustration aesthetic.
negative: blur, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifacts, bad anatomy, dirty, sketch, grainy, lowres, extra limbs, cartoon, anime, photorealistic, messy
